self = session = api_base_url = 'https://tutorialsninja.com/demo' @allure.title("Login error message is generic and does not reveal email existence") @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.CRITICAL) def test_login_error_does_not_reveal_email_existence( self, session, api_base_url: str ): with allure.step("POST login with a non-existent email address"): LOGGER.info("Step: POST login with fake email probe-a@pentest-nonexistent.test") resp_a = _post_login( session, api_base_url, email="probe-a@pentest-nonexistent.test", password="wrongpassword", ) with allure.step("POST login with a different non-existent email address"): LOGGER.info("Step: POST login with fake email probe-b@pentest-nonexistent.test") resp_b = _post_login( session, api_base_url, email="probe-b@pentest-nonexistent.test", password="wrongpassword", ) with allure.step("Assert both responses contain the same generic warning text"): LOGGER.info( "Step: Assert generic warning present and no account-enumeration phrases" ) for resp in (resp_a, resp_b): > assert _GENERIC_LOGIN_ERROR in resp.text, ( f"Expected generic error {_GENERIC_LOGIN_ERROR!r} not found" ) E AssertionError: Expected generic error 'No match for E-Mail Address and/or Password' not found E assert 'No match for E-Mail Address and/or Password' in ' Account Login Affiliate

self = session = api_base_url = 'https://tutorialsninja.com/demo' @allure.title("Login error message is generic and does not reveal email existence") @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.CRITICAL) def test_login_error_does_not_reveal_email_existence( self, session, api_base_url: str ): with allure.step("POST login with a non-existent email address"): LOGGER.info("Step: POST login with fake email probe-a@pentest-nonexistent.test") resp_a = _post_login( session, api_base_url, email="probe-a@pentest-nonexistent.test", password="wrongpassword", ) with allure.step("POST login with a different non-existent email address"): LOGGER.info("Step: POST login with fake email probe-b@pentest-nonexistent.test") resp_b = _post_login( session, api_base_url, email="probe-b@pentest-nonexistent.test", password="wrongpassword", ) with allure.step("Assert both responses contain the same generic warning text"): LOGGER.info( "Step: Assert generic warning present and no account-enumeration phrases" ) for resp in (resp_a, resp_b): > assert _GENERIC_LOGIN_ERROR in resp.text, ( f"Expected generic error {_GENERIC_LOGIN_ERROR!r} not found" ) E AssertionError: Expected generic error 'No match for E-Mail Address and/or Password' not found E assert 'No match for E-Mail Address and/or Password' in ' Account Login Affiliate
